headline: SoFi Technologies Surges 12% on Stablecoin Launch; Robinhood, Upstart Extend Fintech Bounce
summary: SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI) stock is ripping in early Friday trading, up 12% to around $19, as investors react to the company’s push into bank-issued stablecoins. The pop builds on a fintech bounce that started earlier this week. The rally is extending across SoFi’s peers. Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD) stock is ticking up another 1% to approximately ... SoFi Technologies Surges 12% on Stablecoin Launch; Robinhood, Upstart Extend Fintech Bounce
